recommendations: Expand SHELL-03 and SHELL-04 ui_refs during implement using /element_definitions/ai_RNbBKLUd subtree from ir/inventory.json (~752 refs) — anchor ids alone risk missing logged-out nav and popup field groups.
Clarify SHELL-05 auth guard AC: add onboarding-complete redirect to /onboarding or document why AUTH-05-onboarding-health-load-signals is required beyond session check.
Land ENUM-01 before SHELL-02+ implement wave; consider dropping ENUM-03 from SHELL-08/SHELL-10 unless tab/mode labels are consumed at shell mount.

critiques.finding: SHELL-03-header-bar-and-profile-menu lists 10 ui_refs for header reusable ai_RNbBKLUc whose element_definitions/ai_RNbBKLUd subtree spans ~752 inventory references; implement may miss logged-out marketing nav cells and nested header-action groups.
critiques.alternative: Add ui_refs for ai_RNbBHWau (logged-out nav), ai_RNbBHWbF/bG (login/signup triggers), and top-level popup sibling groups, or split SHELL-03 into logged-in vs logged-out header regions.

critiques.finding: SHELL-04-header-login-signup-popups ui_refs cover only 7 anchor ids for login-popup ai_RNbBHWbR and signup-popup ai_RNbBHWbk multi-step form hierarchies nested under ai_RNbBKLUd.
critiques.alternative: Reference ir/slices or inventory pointers for signup-step groups (ai_RNbBHWbs, ai_RNbBHWbd, ai_RNbBHWba) and password-reset link nodes, or cite element_definitions/ai_RNbBKLUd slice path in layout_notes.

critiques.finding: SHELL-05-app-shell-layout depends_on AUTH-05-onboarding-health-load-signals but AC-2 only specifies unauthenticated redirect to /; onboarding-completion guard implied by AUTH-05 AC-3 (route to dashboard) is not testable from shell ACs.
critiques.alternative: Add AC-4 requiring incomplete-onboarding redirect to onboarding route, or remove AUTH-05 depends_on if shell guard is session-only and defer onboarding routing to AUTH module.

critiques.finding: SHELL-08-paths-page-shell and SHELL-10-chat-page-shell depend_on ENUM-03-path-coaching-and-state-enums but item scopes and ACs do not reference path/coaching option sets at shell level — dependency appears speculative for page-shell-only work.
critiques.alternative: Remove ENUM-03 from shell page items; let MOD-DRSAM-PATHS and MOD-DRSAM-CHAT declare enum dependencies when tab/mode UI is implemented.

critiques.finding: Reusable and page-shell item scopes state frontend migration but omit explicit out-of-scope lines for project/ writes and adapter routes per implementation-constraints checklist.
critiques.alternative: Append one-line out-of-scope clause per item: no project/supabase mutations; adapter only if server secret required (unlikely for shell chrome).
